description: A factual_gap wall is cached, but no clean ~2 s opening arrives until after the 12 s pending-wall TTL (the conversation moved on). A late fire would be a stale false interjection — the T-503 TTL drops it first.
source: T-503 staleness fixture (carry-forward from T-302/T-303 review)

timeline.speaker: A
timeline.text: What was that vendor's name? Anyway, moving on —

timeline.speaker: A
timeline.text: let's talk about the launch plan instead.

timeline.speaker: B
timeline.text: Right, the launch. I think we ship Tuesday.

timeline.speaker: B

candidates.label: false
candidates.rationale: The wall went stale: its only clean opening lands ~15 s after it surfaced, long after the conversation moved to the launch plan. A fire here is a late false interjection about a passed topic — the T-503 pending-wall TTL (12 s) drops it before it can fire.
candidates.observed_offer: Want me to find the vendor?
